title: AI Product Analytics Copilot Dashboard
overview: PMs and growth teams steer live charts while a CopilotKit-bound agent explains KPI movement, proposes next diagnostic views, and stays grounded in warehouse facts the user can access.
problem: Passive dashboards force users into side-channel chat with screenshots—losing lineage, permissions, and reproducible analysis.
why: Removes slow RCA loops and ungoverned 'export to ChatGPT' habits.
Fits teams shipping TypeScript analytics products with strict ACLs.
ag_model: User: hovers KPIs, selects cohorts, toggles compare windows.
AI: CopilotKit panel + inline chart actions; proposes structured ChartPatch previews, never silent rewrites.
Decisions: ranked hypotheses with confidence + SQL/metric lineage links.
Overrides: reject/rollback/pin explanation to Slack with redacted snapshot.
Trust: show sample sizes, freshness, and allowlisted queries behind every number.
stack_examples: CopilotKit + Vercel AI SDK for selection-bound streaming.
Next.js + Tailwind + TanStack Query + Zustand.
OpenAI Agents SDK with Zod tools: metric catalog, template SQL, Vega-Lite proposals.
Postgres + pgvector for glossary; Redis for query fingerprints.
arch_points: Input: auth workspace + SelectionState from client.
LLM: analyst agent emitting narrative + optional validated chart patches.
Tools: read-only warehouse via BFF; exports gated.
Memory: optional embeddings over metric glossary.
Output: host components apply accepted patches with audit rows.
impl: Static charts + Copilot reads canned annotations.
LLM explains only precomputed stats JSON.
Template SQL executor + metric catalog tool.
Step 5: Upgrade to agent or multi-agent (if applicable)
Optional LangGraph split: SQL agent vs copy agent.
eval: Safety: tenant isolation tests in CI.
prod: RLS in warehouse views; per-seat rate limits; query audit.
oss_extra: Cube or semantic layer toolkits when needed
stack_default: Next + CopilotKit + Vercel AI SDK + Agents SDK + Postgres + warehouse replica.
stack_light: Mock warehouse + local Postgres; skip pgvector until glossary search matters.
stack_heavy: Dedicated query workers + online evals + per-tenant cost budgets + semantic layer governance.
arch_overview: Next.js dashboard hosts CopilotKit; BFF enforces SQL guardrails; analyst agent calls warehouse through allowlisted templates.
arch_security: - RBAC mirrored in UI and tools; audit AI-suggested mutations; rate limits; PII minimization in prompts.

arch.diagram:
Browser (Next+CopilotKit)
 -> BFF (Hono)
 -> Analytics Agent
 -> Warehouse + metric catalog
dataflow: Agent runs tools + returns structured explanation/patch
UI previews; user accepts; audit persists
arch.agent_ix: Single analyst agent; optional narrator subgraph. CopilotKit mirrors focus + thread.
sync: SelectionState is canonical; server mirrors each turn
No optimistic numbers without server ack

title: AI Customer Support Copilot Console
overview: A **support console** where agents work tickets with a CopilotKit surface that drafts replies, pulls KB articles, and shows confidence—always editable before send.
problem: Plain CRM + separate chat leads to stale macros, untracked AI text, and weak grounding in ticket + customer history.
why: Cuts handle time while keeping humans accountable.
Pairs retrieval with the exact ticket context on screen—not a detached bot.
ag_model: User: triages queues, selects snippets, edits drafts.
AI: suggestion rail + inline completions with confidence badges and citations to KB chunks.
Decisions: propose macros with evidence; high-risk intents require explicit click-to-apply.
Overrides: full manual edit always wins; diff view for AI insertions.
Trust: show article IDs, retrieval scores, and policy flags (refund eligibility, PII).
stack_examples: CopilotKit + Vercel AI SDK in Next.js console.
OpenAI Agents SDK tools: ticket fetch, KB search, order lookup (read-only by default).
Postgres for drafts/audit; pgvector for KB; Redis for session.
Zendesk / Salesforce / Intercom REST via BFF.
arch_points: Input: ticket id + visible fields + agent selection.
LLM: grounded reply composer with structured Draft objects.
Tools: CRM + KB + order search with RBAC.
Output: editable draft buffer; send only via host button.
impl: KB + CRM read tools with ACL.
Embeddings over KB + past approved replies (redacted).
Step 5: Upgrade to agent or multi-agent (if applicable)
Optional supervisor for tone vs facts (LangGraph).
api_lines: Zendesk / Salesforce Service Cloud / Intercom APIs
stack_default: Next console + CopilotKit + Agents SDK + Postgres/pgvector + CRM APIs via BFF.
stack_heavy: Dual approval flows, eval harness on tone+grounding, multi-region BFF.
arch_overview: CopilotKit sits inside the CRM console; BFF mediates CRM/KB tools with ticket-scoped tokens.
arch_security: - RBAC mirrored in UI and tools; audit AI-suggested mutations; rate limits; PII minimization in prompts.

arch.diagram:
Agent UI (Next)
 -> BFF
 -> Support Copilot
 -> CRM + KB
dataflow: Agent edits then sends via host
arch.agent_ix: Single drafting agent with guardrailed tools; human remains in the loop for send.
sync: Draft state in Zustand; CopilotKit co-state for thread + selection
Server stores authoritative ticket snapshot hash

title: AI Live Log Debugging Copilot UI
caps: Reasoning, Tool usage, Streaming, UI interaction
overview: A **live log viewer** where engineers click lines, correlate traces, and a CopilotKit agent explains errors, proposes fixes, and pulls context from CI and source—without leaving the stream.
problem: Terminal dumps and passive log UIs force context switching to chat tools; correlation IDs and stack traces get lost across windows.
why: Speeds incident debugging for TypeScript services.
Keeps AI actions anchored to the log lines the engineer actually selected.
ag_model: User: clicks stack frames, filters levels, pins trace ids.
AI: inline explanations + fix snippets; proposes queries for related deploys.
Decisions: show confidence + linked commit/build; risky actions open PR draft only.
Overrides: ignore suggestion; edit proposed command before run.
Trust: always display raw log line + parser metadata; never hide exceptions.
stack_examples: WebSocket/SSE log tail into React virtualized list.
CopilotKit binds selection to agent tools (fetch file, search symbol, CI job).
OpenAI Agents SDK + GitHub API + CI artifacts.
Postgres for incident notes; Redis for stream buffers.
arch_points: Input: tenant project + environment + log filters.
LLM: debugging copilot with stack-aware tools.
Tools: read repo, fetch CI logs, symbol search (read-only).
Output: structured Finding objects rendered beside selection.
impl: Explain selected line with canned playbooks.
GitHub + CI fetch tools with PAT server-side.
Step 5: Upgrade to agent or multi-agent (if applicable)
fail: Model invents file paths—validate against repo tree
oss_extra: LangChain.js optional for multi-source code search
stack_default: Next + CopilotKit + Agents SDK + WS log ingest + GitHub CI tools.
stack_light: Local log file tail + mocked GitHub.
stack_heavy: Multi-tenant log ingest + trace correlation workers + evals on suggested patches.
arch_overview: Log plane streams into UI; CopilotKit selection drives agent tools against repo + CI systems.
arch_security:
- RBAC mirrored in UI and tools; audit AI-suggested mutations; rate limits; PII minimization in prompts.
- Never exfiltrate secrets from logs to the model without scrubbers.

arch.diagram:
Log UI
 -> ingest WS
 -> Debug Copilot
 -> GitHub/CI/OTel
arch.agent_ix: Agent session bound to trace_id + repo revision.
sync: Selection carries byte offsets + parsed stack keys
CopilotKit keeps thread tied to log filter state

title: AI Financial Planning Copilot Dashboard (Interactive)
overview: An interactive **household finance** workspace where sliders and goals co-drive a CopilotKit agent that recomputes scenarios, surfaces risks, and narrates tradeoffs with transparent assumptions.
problem: Static spreadsheets and chat-only bots either lack interactivity or lack grounding in the user's real cashflow categories.
why: Helps users stress-test plans without exporting sensitive data.
Demonstrates AG-UI for regulated-adjacent consumer finance UX.
ag_model: User: moves sliders for savings rate, rent, debt payoff; toggles goals.
AI: live scenario cards + warnings; proposes adjustments with visible formulas.
Decisions: show confidence bands from Monte Carlo-lite sims run server-side.
Overrides: user pins constraints AI cannot relax without confirmation.
Trust: show assumptions, data sources, and 'not advice' disclaimers where required.
stack_examples: Next + Tailwind charts + CopilotKit for co-scenarios.
Agents SDK tools: recompute ledger, fetch transactions (aggregated), run stress sim.
Plaid (sandbox) or CSV import adapters.
Postgres for user ledger; Redis for fast what-if cache.
arch_points: Input: aggregated category totals (minimize raw txn exposure).
LLM: planning copilot emitting ScenarioCard JSON.
Tools: deterministic finance kernels + aggregation queries.
Output: UI applies cards after validation; PDF export optional.
impl: Manual sliders + local calc without AI.
Step 5: Upgrade to agent or multi-agent (if applicable)
Optional risk agent for compliance copy.
fail: Model gives tax/legal advice—block with policy
oss_extra: Temporal optional for scheduled recompute jobs
stack_default: Next + CopilotKit + Agents SDK + Postgres + Plaid sandbox + deterministic sim service.
stack_heavy: Dedicated analytics workers + compliance review queues + eval harness for advice tone.
arch_overview: UI sliders emit ScenarioParams; BFF runs deterministic kernels; agent narrates and proposes constrained tweaks.
arch_security:
- RBAC mirrored in UI and tools; audit AI-suggested mutations; rate limits; PII minimization in prompts.
- Treat balances as sensitive; never send full account numbers to the model; use aggregate tools.

arch.diagram:
Planner UI
 -> BFF sim kernels
 -> Finance Copilot
 -> Plaid/ledger DB
dataflow: Agent streams explanation + optional tweak cards
arch.agent_ix: CopilotKit binds ScenarioParams; agent cannot mutate numbers without tool outputs.
scale: Worker pool for Monte Carlo batches
sync: Zustand for slider state; server authoritative on money numbers
Optimistic text only, not balances

title: AI Travel Planning Workspace (Interactive Builder)
overview: A **visual itinerary board** where travelers drag stops, adjust days, and a CopilotKit agent proposes improvements, explains tradeoffs, and syncs changes live—distinct from backend multi-agent supplier orchestration.
problem: Chat-only trip bots lose spatial/temporal structure; users cannot co-edit an itinerary like a real planning surface.
why: Pairs human spatial reasoning with grounded suggestions.
Shows AG-UI for collaborative planning without replacing supplier integrations.
ag_model: User: drag blocks, set pace, pin must-see anchors.
AI: contextual rail suggesting reorder, day-budget warnings, weather overlays.
Decisions: preview patches to the itinerary graph; accept applies versioned diff.
Overrides: manual drag always wins; AI cannot book without explicit tool + consent.
Trust: show freshness for prices when tools are wired; label simulated data in MVP.
stack_examples: React flow/canvas + CopilotKit co-editing.
Vercel AI SDK streaming for suggestions.
Agents SDK tools: maps routing, optional supplier adapters.
Postgres for itinerary graph versions; Redis for presence.
arch_points: Input: itinerary graph JSON + user prefs.
LLM: planning copilot emitting graph ops (Zod).
Tools: maps + optional flight/hotel search adapters.
Output: host validates DAG constraints before commit.
impl: Suggest text summaries of static plans.
Step 5: Upgrade to agent or multi-agent (if applicable)
Delegate supplier calls to separate service if paired with travel planner agent system.
stack_default: Next + CopilotKit + Agents SDK + Postgres itinerary store + maps tools.
stack_heavy: Pair with dedicated orchestration service + OTel across UI and agents.
arch_overview: Canvas workspace emits graph events; CopilotKit agent proposes validated ops; optional remote orchestrator for inventory-backed pricing.
arch_security:
- RBAC mirrored in UI and tools; audit AI-suggested mutations; rate limits; PII minimization in prompts.
- This blueprint is the **workspace shell**; pair with [`projects/travel/ai-travel-planner`](projects/travel/ai-travel-planner) if you want the multi-agent supplier orchestration brain.

arch.diagram:
Canvas UI
 -> Workspace Copilot
 -> Maps/tools
 -> (optional) travel orchestration service
arch.agent_ix: Session tied to trip_id; merges serialized through validator queue.
sync: Operational transform or locked single-writer for graph mutations
CopilotKit mirrors selection + panel state

title: AI Hiring Decision Copilot (Recruiter UI)
overview: A **recruiter console** with side-by-side candidates, AI annotations, interview kits, and bias warnings—distinct from a generic hiring chatbot.
problem: Recruiters juggle ATS tabs and unstructured notes; generic ranking lists lack transparent evidence tied to resumes and reqs.
why: Improves structured decisions while keeping humans accountable.
Demonstrates AG-UI for sensitive HR workflows.
ag_model: User: selects two candidates, highlights skills on resume PDFs.
AI: side panel with scored dimensions + citations to resume lines + risk flags.
Decisions: suggested interview questions reference req IDs; cannot auto-reject.
Overrides: recruiter edits scorecard; dismiss AI note with reason.
Trust: show detector outputs as advisory; log overrides for compliance.
stack_examples: Next + CopilotKit for dual-pane compare.
Agents SDK tools: ATS fetch, resume parse, policy KB.
Postgres for scorecards; object storage for PDFs.
arch_points: Input: job_id + candidate_ids + visible resume snippets.
LLM: structured comparative analysis with citations.
Tools: ATS + parser; bias heuristics as separate deterministic checks when possible.
Output: UI renders annotations; no auto-stage changes.
impl: Step 5: Upgrade to agent or multi-agent (if applicable)
Optional policy agent for compliance copy.
eval: Bias flag precision vs human review
stack_default: Next + CopilotKit + Agents SDK + Postgres + ATS integration.
stack_heavy: Dual-control approvals + evals on fairness metrics + enterprise SSO.
arch_overview: Comparison UI drives agent tools; structured annotations return to ATS as drafts only after human commit.
arch_security:
- RBAC mirrored in UI and tools; audit AI-suggested mutations; rate limits; PII minimization in prompts.
- Strict separation of candidate PII across tenants.

arch.diagram:
Recruiter UI
 -> BFF
 -> Hiring Copilot
 -> ATS + resume store
arch.agent_ix: Agent outputs structured Annotation[]; host maps to UI overlays.
sync: Selected lines sent as structured spans
CopilotKit keeps compare state

title: AI Knowledge Workspace (Notion-style with Agent)
overview: A **doc workspace** with blocks, backlinks, and a CopilotKit agent that summarizes, proposes new sections, and surfaces a knowledge graph view—without turning the editor into a passive chat window.
problem: Separate chat tools lose block-level context; users cannot apply AI suggestions as structured edits.
why: Keeps knowledge work inside the editor with diffs.
Great AG-UI reference for block editors + retrieval.
ag_model: User: selects blocks, toggles graph lens, accepts inline suggestions.
AI: sidebar + inline ghost text for new sections; proposes links between pages with preview.
Decisions: patch objects insert as tracked suggestions, not silent writes.
Overrides: reject per hunk; revert stack like git.
Trust: show retrieval sources and similarity scores for auto-links.
stack_examples: Block editor (TipTap/Slate) + CopilotKit.
pgvector for embeddings; Postgres for graph edges.
Agents SDK tools: search pages, insert block patch, fetch backlinks.
arch_points: Input: page_id + block selection + schema version.
LLM: editor copilot emitting BlockPatch[] validated server-side.
Tools: search + link graph queries.
Output: UI diff preview then commit.
impl: Embeddings per page chunk with ACL.
Step 5: Upgrade to agent or multi-agent (if applicable)
Optional sub-agent for graph layout suggestions.
stack_default: Next + CopilotKit + Agents SDK + Postgres/pgvector + block editor.
stack_heavy: Realtime collaboration + CRDT + OTel + eval harness for patch safety.
arch_overview: Editor selection streams to agent; patches validated; graph view queries same ACL-aware index.
arch_security: - RBAC mirrored in UI and tools; audit AI-suggested mutations; rate limits; PII minimization in prompts.

arch.agent_ix: CopilotKit binds selection + scroll anchors; agent constrained to patch grammar.
fail: Large page truncation with continuation tokens
sync: Operational transform or CRDT for concurrent edits
Agent reads serialized snapshot hash

title: AI E-commerce Merchandising Copilot Dashboard
overview: Merchants drag products on a **virtual shelf**, tune pricing sliders, and a CopilotKit agent forecasts margin impact, highlights trends, and proposes bundles—grounded in catalog + sales feeds.
problem: Merch teams bounce between BI tools and spreadsheets; passive dashboards cannot react to drags and drops in the planning canvas.
why: Speeds seasonal layout + pricing experiments.
Shows AG-UI for operations-heavy commerce surfaces.
ag_model: User: drags SKUs, sets promos, adjusts price bands.
AI: overlays demand elasticity hints (when data exists) and proposes bundles with expected AOV lift.
Decisions: preview cards with confidence + historical window used.
Overrides: merchant rejects bundle; AI learns constraint for session.
Trust: show data windows, outliers removed, and simulation assumptions.
stack_examples: Next + CopilotKit + canvas/shelf UI.
Agents SDK tools: fetch sales series, inventory, recommend placement heuristics.
Shopify/Commerce APIs in BFF.
arch_points: Input: catalog slice + drag-drop state.
LLM: merchandising copilot emitting ShelfPatch JSON.
Tools: sales aggregates + inventory checks.
Output: validated UI mutations + audit.
impl: Text tips per SKU without tools.
Step 5: Upgrade to agent or multi-agent (if applicable)
stack_default: Next + CopilotKit + Agents SDK + Postgres + commerce APIs.
stack_heavy: Streaming sales ingest + experiment framework + evals on revenue guardrails.
arch_overview: Shelf UI events feed agent; deterministic sim kernel computes KPI deltas; agent narrates.
arch_security: - RBAC mirrored in UI and tools; audit AI-suggested mutations; rate limits; PII minimization in prompts.

arch.diagram:
Merch UI
 -> BFF
 -> Merch Copilot
 -> Commerce + sales warehouse
arch.agent_ix: Session scoped to store_id; tools read-only until publish action.
sync: Shelf state optimistic with server reconciliation for placements
Price numbers never optimistic without server

title: AI Personal Health Insights Dashboard (Personalized)
overview: A **consumer wellness** dashboard (non-clinical by default) where wearable and habit data meet CopilotKit: users explore charts, and the agent explains patterns, suggests habits, and flags when to seek professionals.
problem: Wellness apps either spam notifications or hide reasoning; users lack interactive, explainable coaching tied to their charts.
why: Demonstrates compassionate AG-UI without replacing clinicians.
Great pattern for consent-heavy personal metrics.
ag_model: User: selects metrics, toggles goals, marks symptoms (non-diagnostic).
AI: contextual insights with ranges + lifestyle suggestions; escalates disclaimers.
Decisions: never auto-changes medical settings; proposals are cards.
Overrides: user dismisses insight; feedback stored locally/session.
Trust: confidence + cohort comparisons where ethical; clear non-diagnostic copy.
stack_examples: Next + CopilotKit + chart interactions.
Apple HealthKit / Google Fit APIs via on-device or BFF bridges (platform dependent).
Postgres for aggregates; encrypt sensitive fields.
arch_points: Input: aggregated metrics + user goals.
LLM: wellness coach with strict policy prompts + tool use for summaries.
Tools: statistical helpers over stored aggregates.
Output: insight cards with citations to user data windows.
impl: Step 5: Upgrade to agent or multi-agent (if applicable)
Optional escalation triage agent for care navigation (policy-bound).
eval: Safety: refusal tests on diagnostic asks
api_lines: Optional FHIR sandboxes only if you expand to clinical pilots
stack_default: Next + CopilotKit + Agents SDK + Postgres + wearable integrations via BFF.
stack_heavy: HIPAA/BAA path as separate deployment mode with hardened controls.
arch_overview: Charts emit MetricSelection; agent pulls aggregates via tools; strict policy layer for medical boundaries.
arch_security:
- RBAC mirrored in UI and tools; audit AI-suggested mutations; rate limits; PII minimization in prompts.
- Wellness UX only unless you integrate licensed clinical workflows; avoid diagnostic claims.

arch.diagram:
Wellness UI
 -> BFF
 -> Wellness Copilot
 -> Metrics store
arch.agent_ix: CopilotKit binds goals + selections; policy guard intercepts clinical asks.
sync: Local-first option for sensitive reads
Server stores aggregates not raw streams when possible

title: AI Learning Copilot (Interactive Study UI)
overview: An **interactive study surface** where learners select text, run quick quizzes generated in-place, and CopilotKit keeps difficulty adaptive—distinct from a passive tutoring chat.
problem: Chat tutors ignore page structure; students cannot anchor questions to specific lesson blocks or get immediate inline checks.
why: Improves retention with micro-interactions.
Shows AG-UI for structured pedagogy.
ag_model: User: highlights passage, requests quiz, marks confidence per item.
AI: inline questions + explanations tied to selection spans; adjusts next item difficulty.
Decisions: show rationale after attempt; learner can challenge with follow-up.
Overrides: skip topic; teacher locks curriculum sections.
Trust: cite lesson source ids; show coverage map of syllabus.
stack_examples: Next + CopilotKit + lesson renderer (MDX/blocks).
Agents SDK tools: fetch lesson chunk, generate items with schema, log mastery.
Postgres for mastery model.
arch_points: Input: course_id + selection span ids.
LLM: tutor agent emitting QuestionItem[] validated.
Tools: lesson repository + analytics.
Output: inline UI components from structured items.
impl: Step 5: Upgrade to agent or multi-agent (if applicable)
Optional coach vs assessor split via LangGraph.
api_lines: LMS APIs if embedded (Canvas/Google Classroom) optional
oss_extra: LangChain.js optional for RAG over course packs
stack_default: Next + CopilotKit + Agents SDK + Postgres mastery store.
stack_heavy: Multi-tenant schools + eval harness for question quality + moderation queue.
arch_overview: Lesson selection streams to tutor agent; questions render as structured components; mastery updated via tools.
arch_security:
- RBAC mirrored in UI and tools; audit AI-suggested mutations; rate limits; PII minimization in prompts.
- Minimize student PII in prompts; parental controls where required.

arch.diagram:
Lesson UI
 -> BFF
 -> Study Copilot
 -> Content + mastery DB
arch.agent_ix: CopilotKit binds selection + quiz panel; difficulty policy server-side.
sync: Quiz state in Zustand; server authoritative for grading
Optimistic UI only for non-graded hints
